products.name: Safety Zone Chemical-Resistant Gloves, 13 in Length, 15 mil Thick, Green, 12 Dozen/case
products.description:
This product has a 13 in length. The Safety Zone chemical-resistant glove is made of nitrile, is packaged 12 dozen per case, comes in green and meets CFR 21 174-178 standards. Proper sizing is important when buying this part. Resists a broad range of chemical solvents, grease
and animal fat.
Non-slip grip makes wet work safer and easier.
13" straight cuff.
Meets military spec-Mil-G-07011-NU.

Product Specifications:
Brand: Safety Zone
Product Type: Chemical-Resistant Gloves
Material: Nitrile
Lining Material: Flock
Resistant Properties: Solvent-Resistant
Thickness: 15 mil
Sizing: S-XL
Overall Length: 13 in
Color: Green
Package Quantity: 12 dozen per case
Series: 990800
Case Quantity: 12 dozen per case
Standards Met: CFR 21 174-178

products.name: Safety Zone® Total Grip Latex Exam Grade Gloves, Powder-Free, Natural, 8 mil
products.description:
TOTAL GRIP® Natural White Latex Powder Free Exam Gloves are the preferred latex gloves of the automotive industry. The natural white color helps to show any dirt, grease or grime on your hands while working. These gloves run on an average of 8 mil thick meaning you have more and a longer time frame of protection with the increased thickness. TOTAL GRIP® latex gloves will save you money compared to similar gloves from other brands.

**ProWorks branding is changing to Safety Zone®. The gloves are the exact same, but our branding and packaging is being updated. Please note that this will be a rolling change and you may receive mixed packaging styles until our inventory is depleted.**
Product Details
Number	GL-L165FL
Brand	Safety Zone®
Sub-Brand	Total Grip®
Case LxWxH	17.1 x 10.9 x 10.4
Case Weight (lbs.)	22.65
Certification	Standard: Meets ASTM D3578-05.
